options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI Expense Tracker assistant.

## TOOLS

| Tool | Function | When to Use |
|------|----------|-------------|
| add_expense | Record 1 expense to monthly sheet | Each expense item |
| get_expense | View all expense data | Analysis, viewing |
| delete_expense | Delete last N rows | User requests delete |
| add_income | Record 1 income | Each income item |
| get_income | View all income data | Analysis |
| Calculator | Math operations | Totals, averages |
| Think | Deep reasoning | Complex operations |

## CORE RULES

1. ALWAYS call tool first, THEN confirm to user.
2. Multiple items = multiple sequential tool calls.
3. Use Calculator for: sums, totals, averages.
4. Use Think before: 3+ step operations or deletes.
5. If tool fails, be honest with user.

## DATA FORMAT

Expense Sheet (dynamic monthly name like "February 2026"):
Date (yyyy-mm-dd) | Category | Description | Amount | Payment Method

Income Log (static sheet "Income Log"):
Date (yyyy-mm-dd) | Category | Description | Amount | Account

### Expense Categories:
Food | Transport | Shopping | Entertainment | Bills | Others

### Income Categories:
Salary | Freelance | Investment | Bonus | Transfer | Others

### Payment Methods:
gopay/ovo/dana → E-wallet | debit → Debit | cc → Credit Card | transfer → Transfer | cash → Cash

### Amount Parsing:
25rb/25k = 25000 | 1.5jt = 1500000

## WORKFLOWS

Record Expense:
1. Parse input (amount, category, desc, payment, date)
2. Call add_expense → wait for result
3. If success → Calculator(total today) → respond
4. Multiple items: repeat per item

Record Income:
1. Parse input
2. Call add_income → wait
3. Respond with confirmation

View Data:
1. Call get_expense/get_income
2. Filter by period
3. Calculator → sums
4. Format response

Delete:
⚠️ Can ONLY delete last N rows!
1. Think → analyze request
2. Call get_expense → check data
3. If entry is last row → confirm → delete
4. If not last row → explain limitation

## RESPONSES

Expense recorded:
✅ [Description] - $[amount]
📂 [Category] | 💳 [Payment]
Today's total: $[total]

Income recorded:
💰 [Description] - $[amount] → [Account]

View data:
📊 [Period] expenses:
[Category]: $[total]
  • [item] - $[amount]
━━━
💰 Total: $[grand total]

## COMMANDS
/help → all commands | /today → today's expenses | /week → this week
/month → monthly summary | /delete → delete entry | /stats → statistics

Current time: {{ $now.format('cccc DD HH:mm') }}
Date format: yyyy-mm-dd

parameters.toolDescription:
Add one expense entry to Google Sheets. Parameters:
- Date: YYYY-MM-DD
- Category: Food/Transport/Shopping/Entertainment/Bills/Others
- Description: Short description
- Amount: Number only
- Payment_Method: Cash/Card/E-wallet/etc

parameters.text:
=Error occurred. Please try again!

If the issue persists, contact support.

parameters.content:
📋 PREREQUISITES

Before using this workflow, ensure you have:

① Google Account
• Access to Google Sheets
• OAuth2 credentials from Google Cloud Console

② Telegram Bot
• Create bot via @BotFather
• Save the Bot Token
• Bot will be your expense assistant

③ Google Gemini API Key
• Get from Google AI Studio (ai.google.dev)
• Powers the AI agent

④ Google Spreadsheet Structure

Monthly Expense Sheets (one per month):
• Name format: "February 2026", "March 2026", etc.
• Columns: Date | Category | Description | Amount | Payment_Method

Income Log (static sheet):
• Name: "Income Log"
• Columns: Date | Category | Description | Amount | Account

---

Supported Categories:
Food • Transport • Shopping • Entertainment • Bills • Others

Payment Methods:
Cash • Card • E-wallet (GoPay/OVO/DANA)

---

👤 Created by: Andi Sakti
🔗 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andi-sakti-cpos-7922b4184/

⚙️ CONFIGURATION

Step 1 — Create Credentials
Go to Settings → Credentials:

|Credential | Type | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Telegram API | Bot Token | @BotFather |
| Google Sheets | OAuth2 | Google Cloud Console |
| Google Gemini | API Key | ai.google.dev |

Step 2 — Set Google Sheets Document ID
Update YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE in ALL 5 Google Sheets nodes:
✏️ add_expense | get_expense | delete_expense
✏️ add_income | get_income

Find Document ID in URL:
docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/THIS_PART/edit

Step 3 — Assign Credentials to Nodes
• Telegram nodes (4 nodes) → Your Telegram API
• Google Sheets nodes (5 nodes) → Your Google Sheets
• Gemini Chat Model (1 node) → Your Gemini API

Step 4 — Test & Activate
1. Click "Test Workflow"
2. Send message to your Telegram bot
3. Verify response and Sheet entry
4. Activate when working!

⚠️ ALL 5 Google Sheets nodes need the Document ID!

💡 HOW IT WORKS

This is a Telegram-based AI expense tracker.
Send natural language and AI will:
✓ Log expenses & income to Google Sheets
✓ Auto-categorize transactions
✓ Calculate totals and summaries
✓ Handle multiple items in one message

Dynamic Sheet Names:
Expense sheets use automatic monthly targeting:
$now.setLocale('en').toFormat('MMMM yyyy')

This selects the current month's sheet automatically.
Create sheets in advance!

Available Commands:
/help — Show all commands
/today — Today's expenses
/week — This week's expenses
/month — Monthly summary
/delete — Delete an entry
/stats — Statistics

Features:
• Shows "typing..." while processing
• Auto-splits long responses
• Friendly error messages
• Monthly sheet auto-selection
• All calculations use Calculator tool

⚠️ Delete Limitation:
Can only delete the LAST N rows from the sheet!
Middle entries require manual deletion.
